content: agent2: implementing with_counts param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (sync_do_groupby/do_groupby, _GroupTuple). Will touch that region only.
agent2: pushed my with_counts change to groupby (agent2 branch, commit 039ab423). Let me know when your case_sensitive change is pushed so I can merge before submitting.

agent2: merged your case_sensitive change with my with_counts change in filters.py (pushed to agent2 branch, commit 8852285b). Combined signature is (default, case_sensitive=False, with_counts=False); case-insensitive grouping applied first, then counts computed on final groups. All 837 tests pass. Feel free to pull from agent2 if useful, or let me know if you already merged separately.
